title: epipactis latifolia subsp. helleborine
intro: Epipactis latifolia subsp. helleborine, also known as the helleborine orchid or broad-leaved helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Epipactis latifolia subsp. helleborine include its use in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Epipactis latifolia subsp. helleborine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and sore throats.
